addAlumniRecord(string,bytes32).details: Add a new alumni record to the blockchain

params._dataHash: Hash of alumni data (name, roll, degree, branch, year)

returns.blockNumber: Block number when record was added

params._issuer: Address of the issuer to authorize

constructor.details: Constructor sets the contract deployer as owner and first authorized issuer

params._institutionName: Name of the institution deploying the contract

generateDataHash(string,string,string,st.details: Generate hash from alumni data (to be called by backend)

getRecord(string).details: Get record details by certificate ID (without hash verification)

returns.blockNumber: Block number when record was added
returns.isRevoked: Boolean indicating if record is revoked

isAuthorizedIssuer(address).details: Check if an address is authorized issuer

returns._0: Boolean indicating if address is authorized

recordExists(string).details: Check if a certificate ID exists

revokeAlumniRecord(string).details: Revoke an alumni record by certificate ID

params._issuer: Address of the issuer to revoke

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfer ownership to a new address

verifyRecord(string,bytes32).details: Verify an alumni record by certificate ID

params._dataHash: Hash to verify against stored hash

returns.blockNumber: Block number when record was added
returns.isRevoked: Boolean indicating if record is revoked
returns.isValid: Boolean indicating if record is valid
